description: Log in to Moodle (http://localhost/moodle) as admin (username: admin, password: Admin1234!). In the "Introduction to Biology" (BIO101) course, create a forum named "Nature vs Nurture Debate" with the description "Debate the relative importance of genetics and environment." Configure the forum to use an "Average of ratings" aggregate type with a 5-point scale. Ensure the "Student" role has the permission to "Rate posts" for this specific forum.
